articles.title: Indian AI innovations make their mark
articles.description: At the India AI Impact Summit 2026, Indian deeptech startups showcased innovations beyond services, from electric air taxis to autonomous delivery robots. The most striking moment came from eight-year-old Ranvir Sachdeva, the youngest keynote speaker, linking ancient Indian philosophy with AI. These developments signal India’s move into frontier technology.

articles.title: ons won’t help IT, cybersecurity weather this storm
articles.description: In less than ten days, Anthropic triggered two separate stock selloffs across enterprise technology. First, its Cowork agent shook IT services stocks. Then, late last week, it launched Claude Code Security, a tool that scans software for weaknesses and suggests fixes.

articles.title: Facial recognition used to capture accused East Baltimore killer with violent past
articles.description: Police used facial recognition technology to arrest a repeat, violent offender accused of killing a father of three and a convenience store worker during an armed robbery in East Baltimore on February 13.
articles.content:
Police used facial recognition technology to arrest a repeat, violent offender accused of killing a father of three and a convenience store worker during an armed robbery in East Baltimore on February 13.
The suspect, 52-year-old Brian Burrows, appea... [2200 chars]

articles.title: Trump Administration Believes China's DeepSeek Used Nvidia's Advanced AI Chips for Model Training
articles.description: The Trump administration believes China's DeepSeek used Nvidia's most advanced AI chips to train its latest model, according to a U.S. official. This revelation highlights concerns about technology transfer and underscores the strategic importance of AI chip technology in the current geopolitical landscape.
articles.content:
The Trump administration has determined that China's artificial intelligence company DeepSeek utilized Nvidia's most advanced AI chips to train its latest model, according to a U.S. official.
Technology Transfer Concerns
This revelation highlights on... [2161 chars]

articles.title: JPMorgan Will Spend Almost $20 Billion on Technology This Year
articles.description: JPMorgan is boosting its tech budget by$2 billion in 2026, focusing on AI projects.
articles.content:
JPMorgan plans to boost its technology budget by almost $2 billion this year, to $19.8 billion — a roughly 10% increase compared to 2025.
Speaking at the firm's 2026 company update on Monday, CFO Jeremy Barnum said "technology remains a major driver ... [1545 chars]

articles.title: Shop workers still enduring appalling levels of abuse on a daily basis
articles.description: Research shows number of violence and abuse suffered by retail workers has fallen thanks to use of technology and focus by police
articles.content:
Research shows number of violence and abuse suffered by retail workers has fallen thanks to use of technology and focus by police
Shop workers suffered an average of 1,600 incidents of violence and abuse every day year, latest figures have revealed.

articles.title: Premier "angry" at OpenAI for not telling police about Tumbler Ridge shooter concerns
articles.description: Federal and provincial politicians expressed alarm today at reports technology giant OpenAI had flagged the Tumbler Ridge shooter for concerning online behaviour before the tragedy, but failed to inform police.
articles.content:
Federal and provincial politicians expressed alarm today at reports technology giant OpenAI had flagged the Tumbler Ridge shooter for concerning online behaviour before the tragedy, but failed to inform police.
Premier David Eby is demanding answers ... [3095 chars]

articles.description: Researchers based in China have created an artificial intelligence -based tool that combines a mixture of patient information, including genetic data, clinical symptoms, and doctors’ notes, to...
articles.content: Researchers based in China have created an artificial intelligence (AI)-based tool that combines a mixture of patient information, including genetic data, clinical symptoms, and doctors’ notes, to help diagnose rare diseases more quickly and accurate... [1455 chars]

articles.title: WJZ launches new technology-driven AR/VR studio to enhance newscasts
articles.description: WJZ launched its new AR/VR studio, an augmented reality and virtual reality set that transforms the way it delivers content.
articles.content:
WJZ launched its new AR/VR studio, an augmented reality and virtual reality set that transforms the way it delivers content.
The technology-driven studio was unveiled during WJZ at noon on Monday, Feb. 23.
"The launch of our AR/VR studio marks the be... [1317 chars]
